rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Boeing Company And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Or Its Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, July 6, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of the person most qualified and custodian of records of defendant Boeing Company and request for sanctions is continued on the court¿s own motion to July 13, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220 to provide the parties with an opportunity to engage in further meet and confer efforts regarding all issues raised by the motion. If all issues raised by the motion are not resolved before then, by 4:30pm on July 12 the parties are required to send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain unresolved and then appear at the hearing at 9am on July 13. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD BARRON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, July 6, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Tosco Corporation¿s motion for protective order is off calendar as moot per the court¿s May 16 ruling on plaintiff¿s motion to compel. = (220/HEK)
